system.descriptor: Many groups and organisations employ ciphers as a secret shorthand code for communicating basic ideas, warnings, or information rapidly. Each skill group is acquired and used separately.
system.uses:
Skill Groups: Xenos Markings, Deathwatch, Chapter Runes, Imperial Codes, Mercenary Cant, Inquisition, Underworld.
Uses: Leave or read basic messages without a test; communicate complex meanings or decipher signs obscured by time or circumstance with a test.
Xenos Markings: Alien symbols warning of danger, territory, ownership, or similar meanings.
Deathwatch: Kill-team shorthand for secret communication in the presence of outsiders.
Chapter Runes: Closely guarded Chapter ciphers used between Battle-Brothers.
Imperial Codes: Numerical and abbreviated battle-language used by the Imperial Guard and Imperial Navy.
Mercenary Cant: Abbreviated battle-language used by mercenary companies.
Inquisition: Private, pre-arranged ciphers used by agents of the Inquisition.
Underworld: Criminal shorthand and signs used by smugglers, gangs, and other lawbreakers.

description.value:
Many groups and organisations employ ciphers as a secret shorthand code for communicating basic ideas, warnings, or information rapidly. The character can use and understand the signals, physical markings, or other subtle signs employed to express these concepts.

Skill Groups: Xenos Markings, Deathwatch, Chapter Runes, Imperial Codes, Mercenary Cant, Inquisition, Underworld
